_comment: Fabricated data for frontend panels. The chat AI now uses backend agentic system with richer data.

whatsappMessages.text: Students, the lab exam for Embedded Systems is scheduled for June 20th. You need to prepare all 10 lab programs. Viva will cover ARM architecture and interfacing.
CAT 2 syllabus: Syntax-directed translation, intermediate code generation, and code optimization (Units 3-4). Open book — only handwritten notes allowed.
Reminder: Assignment 4 on Hypothesis Testing is due this Friday (June 16th) by 11:59 PM. Submit on Moodle.
Study group for Embedded lab exam? I'm free tomorrow 6-8 PM. We can meet at the library and go through all programs together.
Updated timetable for next week: DBMS lab shifted from Thursday to Friday 2-4 PM due to faculty conference.
Lab 5 (Page Replacement Algorithms) deadline extended to June 28th. Implement FIFO, LRU, and Optimal.
Tomorrow's class will cover Transport Layer protocols (TCP/UDP). Read Kurose Chapter 3 sections 3.4-3.7. Quiz at start of class.
Microsoft visiting campus on July 5th. Eligible: CGPA > 8.0, no active backlogs. Register on Superset by June 25th.
Team registrations open for Smart India Hackathon 2026. Deadline: June 20th. DM me if you need a team.
This week's paper: 'Attention Is All You Need'. Meeting Sunday 4 PM in LH-301.
Codeforces Round #950 tonight at 8:30 PM IST. Good problems on graphs and DP expected.
Project Phase 2 submissions: ER diagram + normalization (up to 3NF) due June 22nd. Groups of 3 max.
